hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "<channel source"; then echo "telegram" > /tmp/claude_channel_mode.txt; rm -f /tmp/claude_afk_sticky.txt; elif echo "$INPUT" | grep -qi "^afk$\|^afk "; then echo "telegram" > /tmp/claude_channel_mode.txt; echo "1" > /tmp/claude_afk_sticky.txt; elif echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "system-reminder\|task-notification\|command-name\|local-command\|command-message\|AUTOMATED ENFORCEMENT\|ENFORCEMENT CHECK\|cron.*check\|Run checks silently"; then true; elif [ -f /tmp/claude_afk_sticky.txt ]; then true; else echo "terminal" > /tmp/claude_channel_mode.txt; fi; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "attachment_kind.*voice\|attachment_kind.*audio\|/voice"; then echo "voice" > /tmp/claude_voice_mode.txt; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"UserPromptSubmit\",\"additionalContext\":\"VOICE INPUT DETECTED. You MUST reply with voice (tts.py + send audio file). Text-only reply is NOT acceptable.\"}}"; else echo "text" > /tmp/claude_voice_mode.txt; fi'

bash -c 'PROMPT="$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT"; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^yours"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"AGENT OWNS INSTANCE. Free to kill electron, rebuild, relaunch. User is not using the app.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^mine"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"HANDS OFF. Do NOT touch the running app instance. Do NOT kill electron. User is actively using it.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^wazzup$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"WAZZUP. Report: git status, latest CI run, running processes, top 5 backlog items.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^ci$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"CI. Check the latest GitHub Actions CI run status and report.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^push$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"PUSH. Commit all staged changes and push to remote immediately.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^nuke$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"NUKE. Kill all electron/node processes, clear ALL caches (vite, Code Cache, GPUCache, Dawn), rebuild from scratch.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^relaunch$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"RELAUNCH. Kill running app, clear caches, rebuild, relaunch.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^clean$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"CLEAN. Clear vite + Electron caches only. No rebuild.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^test$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"TEST. Run npx playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts and report results.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^qa$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"QA. Spawn a QA agent to validate the last visual change against reference.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^perf$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"PERF. Run the orbit drag perf test and report frame timing stats.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^save state$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"SAVE STATE. Update MEMORY.md with current work, commit all changes, push.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^html "; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"HTML PAGE REQUEST. Create a standalone interactive HTML page for the request that follows. Use the frontend-design skill quality standards: dark theme, HAL-O aesthetic (cyan/green accents, monospace), production-grade, memorable design. Save to D:/GitHub/hal-o/temp/ and open in browser with: start \x27\x27 filepath. ALWAYS open it automatically.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^todo[: ]"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"TODO. Add the following item to the project backlog (project_todo_backlog.md). Assign next available ID.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^queue[: ]"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"QUEUE. Start working on this task immediately. Add to backlog as in-progress, then begin implementation.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^ship$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"SHIP. Build the app, run smoke tests, commit all changes, push to remote. Full release pipeline.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^silent$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"SILENT. Stop sending Telegram notifications. Set /tmp/claude_silent_mode.txt=1.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^loud$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"LOUD. Resume Telegram notifications. Remove /tmp/claude_silent_mode.txt.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^zog zog$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"ZOG ZOG. Orc status report! Reply with voice using the orc profile. Speak as a loyal Orc peon reporting to the Warchief.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qi "^board$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"additionalContext\":\"BOARD. Read project_todo_backlog.md + MEMORY.md, generate an interactive HTML dashboard with all TODOs, done items, and project state. Kanban-style columns (TODO/IN PROGRESS/DONE). Dark theme, HAL-O aesthetic. Save to D:/GitHub/hal-o/temp/board.html and open in browser.\"}}"; exit 0; fi;'
